MIRROR_IMAGE_POWER.title: Mirror Image
MIRROR_IMAGE_POWER.description: The first card you play each turn is [gold]replayed[/gold]. Taking unblocked damage removes all stacks.
MEMORY_POWER.title: Memory
MEMORY_POWER.description: Whenever one of your [gold]mirror images[/gold] is destroyed, draw 2 cards and gain 1 energy.
KALEIDOSCOPE_POWER.title: Kaleidoscope
KALEIDOSCOPE_POWER.description: Every 5 cards you play, create a mirror image and deal 6 damage to all enemies.
PHASE_SHIFT_POWER.title: Phase Shift
PHASE_SHIFT_POWER.description: The next time you take unblocked damage, your mirror images are not destroyed.
DAZZLE_POWER.title: Dazzle
DAZZLE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain Block equal to your current number of mirror images.
CRESCENDO_POWER.title: Crescendo
CRESCENDO_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain Strength equal to its stacks.
REKINDLE_POWER.title: Rekindle
REKINDLE_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Copy[/gold] a mirror image for each stack, then this expires.
ENCORE_POWER.title: Encore
ENCORE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, return a random card with [gold]Retain[/gold] from your discard pile to your hand.
TRANSMUTE_POWER.title: Transmute
TRANSMUTE_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, each transmuted card [gold]transforms[/gold] into the card it was before its latest [gold]transform[/gold].
FLUXWEAVE_POWER.title: Fluxweave
FLUXWEAVE_POWER.description: For every 2 cards you transform, draw 1 card.
IMPROVISE_POWER.title: Improvise
IMPROVISE_POWER.description: The first time you transmute a card each turn, play the transmuted card at a random enemy.
